subtasks.what_to_do: Create 5 symbol cards (↑ = jump, ↓ = sit, → = step right, ← = step left, ● = clap).
subtasks.how_they_help: Show each card, demonstrate action, child copies. Repeat 3 times.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write a 5-step sequence on paper: ↑ ● ↓ → ←
subtasks.how_they_help: Child performs sequence. If wrong, point to card again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates a 4-step sequence for you.
subtasks.how_they_help: You perform incorrectly. Child corrects by pointing. Then you do correctly.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hide a small object. Draw map using symbols (↑ means go straight, → turn right).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child follows map to find object. Time with slow count.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write a 3-word sentence in symbols (e.g., ↑ ↓ ● means 'jump sit clap').
subtasks.how_they_help: Child reads sentence and performs. Then writes own sentence.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use colored paper: red = stop, green = go, yellow = slow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hold up colors randomly. Child responds. Add blue = spin.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a daily routine using symbols (wake, eat, study, play, sleep).
subtasks.how_they_help: Display on wall. Child points to each as they complete it.

subtasks.what_to_do: Play 'Simon Says' using only symbol cards.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show a card. If card has star (Simon says), child does it. If no star, child freezes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a sibling or friend 3 new symbols.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shows card, sibling guesses action. Child gives thumbs up/down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents 2 new symbols for emotions (happy, sad).
subtasks.how_they_help: Draw on paper. Use them tomorrow. Nod when used correctly.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a toy near a wall. Shine a flashlight (or sunlight). Trace shadow.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child traces shadow at 9 AM. Write time on paper.

subtasks.what_to_do: Move flashlight closer and farther.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child observes shadow size changes. Draw big and small shadow.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use two flashlights (or one sun + one lamp).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child makes two shadows. Points to darker one.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a transparent cup and an opaque cup side by side.
subtasks.how_they_help: Shine light. Child observes which makes darker shadow. Records.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut a shape from cardboard. Tape to stick.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child makes shadow puppet show for 30 seconds (no sound). You watch.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a pencil in clay. Mark shadow every hour for 4 hours.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws marks. Connects dots to see shadow path.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use colored cellophane over light (red, blue, green).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shines on white paper. Names colors seen.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a mirror at 45 degrees. Reflect light onto ceiling.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child moves mirror to make shadow move up/down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Three objects: ball, book, pencil. Guess which shadow longest.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child writes guess. Tests with light. Compares.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a comic strip of shadow changing from 9 AM to 3 PM.
subtasks.how_they_help: Use 4 panels. Write time under each. Display on wall.

subtasks.what_to_do: Find a spoon. Use as lever to lift a small book.
subtasks.how_they_help: Place fulcrum (pencil) under spoon. Child lifts book. Measures height.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a rolling pin (or round bottle) as wheel.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child rolls it across table. Then places book on top and rolls again. Notes difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a ramp from a cardboard piece. Roll a marble down.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child changes ramp height (low, medium, high). Measures speed with stopwatch or count.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use scissors to cut paper in straight line, then curved line.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child compares effort. Writes which was harder.

subtasks.what_to_do: Tie a string to a bucket (or cup). Pull over a broomstick (pulley).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child lifts a small weight. Then lifts without pulley. Compares.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a screw (or bottle cap with threads). Screw into clay.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child screws in with fingers. Then uses screwdriver. Notes difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Find a door wedge (or folded paper). Stop a rolling ball.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child places wedge at different distances. Measures where ball stops.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a broom as lever to lift a heavy bag.
subtasks.how_they_help: Place fulcrum (brick). Child pushes down one end. Measures lift.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws 4 simple machines found at home (lever, wheel, ramp, screw).
subtasks.how_they_help: Label each. Write one use for each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new simple machine using cardboard and string.
subtasks.how_they_help: Draw design. Build prototype. Test with small object. You clap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Measure table length using hand spans. Write number.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child measures. Then measures with shoe length. Compares numbers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill a cup with water. Pour into different shaped containers.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child observes same amount looks different. Writes observation.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a water bottle as measuring cup (mark lines with tape).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child measures 100ml, 200ml, 300ml. Pours into bowl. Marks levels.

subtasks.what_to_do: Weigh objects using a hanger balance (two cups on strings).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child places coin in left, button in right. Sees which heavier. Records 5 comparisons.

subtasks.what_to_do: Time how many jumping jacks in 30 seconds (use phone timer or count).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child does. Writes number. Repeats after rest. Compares.

subtasks.what_to_do: Measure room temperature using hand feel (cold, cool, warm, hot).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks morning, noon, evening. Draws thermometer with colors.

subtasks.what_to_do: Count how many steps from bedroom to kitchen.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child walks normally, then big steps, then small steps. Writes three numbers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill a jar with rice. Guess how many spoons. Then count.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child writes guess. Uses spoon to fill. Writes actual. Finds difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a bar graph of family members' heights (using hand spans).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child measures everyone. Draws bars. Labels tallest and shortest.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child chooses any 5 objects. Orders them from lightest to heaviest using balance.
subtasks.how_they_help: Write list. Compare with guess. Circle correct ones.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 6 pictures of a daily activity (brushing teeth).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child mixes pictures. You arrange correctly. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write a 4-panel comic about 'A lost key found'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws. Shows you. You nod or point to missing panel.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use emotion cards (happy, sad, angry, scared, surprised).
subtasks.how_they_help: You hold a card. Child acts emotion. Family guesses.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts a short story (3 scenes) without words.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write what you think happened. Child nods or re-acts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut out 5 pictures from old newspaper. Arrange to tell a story.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child glues on paper. Writes 1 sentence per picture.

subtasks.what_to_do: Create a 'How to make tea' sequence (6 steps).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws. Numbers steps. You follow drawing to make tea.

subtasks.what_to_do: Watch a 1-minute muted video (or silent cartoon).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child writes 3 sentences about what happened. You check.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child tells a story using only 5 objects (cup, key, shoe, spoon, book).
subtasks.how_they_help: Moves objects to show action. You guess story.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a map of 'My day' with symbols (sun = morning, moon = night).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child includes 5 activities. Points and explains to you.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new ending to a known fable (draw 3 panels).
subtasks.how_they_help: Display with original ending. Family points to favorite.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper in half. Paint one side only. Press and open.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child observes mirror image. Draws line of symmetry.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw half a butterfly. Child draws other half.
subtasks.how_they_help: Use grid paper if available. Compare halves.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use mirror (or still water in bowl). Write name and hold to mirror.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child writes name backwards so mirror shows correct. Practice 3 times.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut a circle from paper. Fold into 2, then 4, then 8 equal parts.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child labels fractions (1/2, 1/4, 1/8).

subtasks.what_to_do: Build a symmetric tower with blocks or stones (left mirrors right).
subtasks.how_they_help: You build left half. Child mirrors right half. Check with mirror.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a vertical line. Child draws shapes on left. You mirror on right.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks. Gives thumbs up or corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Find 5 symmetric objects in house (plate, book, spoon, cup, window).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws each. Draws line of symmetry on each drawing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use tangram (cut square into 7 shapes). Make symmetric animal.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child builds. You guess animal. Child nods or repositions.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper twice. Cut small shapes from edges. Unfold.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child counts number of identical sections (4). Names symmetric.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a symmetric monster. Cuts in half. Friend matches halves.
subtasks.how_they_help: Time with stopwatch. Child writes time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stretch balloon over bowl. Place rice on top.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps bowl from below. Sees rice jump. Draws what happened.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hum while holding balloon to cheek.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels vibration. Then hums louder. Notes difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill 4 glasses with different water levels. Tap with spoon.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child observes water movement. Ranks from most to least ripple.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stretch rubber band over a box. Pluck hard, then soft.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches vibration. Draws big vs small waves.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place hand on table. Someone taps far end.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels vibration. Moves hand closer. Notes stronger feel.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a metal spoon and plastic spoon. Tap both on table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels which vibrates longer. Writes result.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill a bowl with water. Tap edge with spoon.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches ripples. Drops a leaf. Sees leaf move.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hold a ruler half off table. Pluck end.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child sees vibration. Moves ruler shorter. Notes faster vibration.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a 'vibration dance' (move body to strong taps).
subtasks.how_they_help: You tap table in rhythm. Child dances. You copy child's move.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a poster 'What makes vibration?' with 5 examples.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws rubber band, drum, glass, balloon, ruler. Display.

subtasks.what_to_do: Create 10 picture cards (water, food, help, hurt, yes, no, play, sleep, want, toilet).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shows card. You respond. Child gives thumbs up if correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a 3-item shopping list.
subtasks.how_they_help: You go to 'pretend shop' (kitchen). Child points to items. You collect.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 4-step instruction for making lemonade.
subtasks.how_they_help: You follow exactly. If wrong, child points to mistake.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child uses 'yes' and 'no' cards to answer 5 questions (Do you like rice? etc.).
subtasks.how_they_help: You ask. Child holds up card. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a short note: 'I want water please.'
subtasks.how_they_help: You read. Bring water. Child writes 'thank you'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Play charades: Child acts an emotion. You guess and write.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child nods or shakes head. Then swap roles.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a daily schedule (wake, eat, study, play, sleep) with times.
subtasks.how_they_help: Hang on wall. Child checks off each with a mark.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes 3 questions to ask you (e.g., 'What is for dinner?').
subtasks.how_they_help: You write answers on same paper. Child reads.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new hand signal for 'come here'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Teach you. You use it rest of day. Child gives thumbs up when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a map of room with X for hidden treasure.
subtasks.how_they_help: You follow map. Child points if you go wrong.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use fingers to show numbers 1 to 10. You guess.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shows. You write guess. Child nods or corrects with more fingers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child shows 5 + 3 using stones (5 stones, then 3 more).
subtasks.how_they_help: You write answer (8). Child nods.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child arranges 10 buttons in 2 rows of 5.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '2 × 5 = 10'. Child points to rows and columns.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a number line 0 to 10. Jumps finger from 3 to 7.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '3 + 4 = 7'. Child nods.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child splits 8 raisins into 2 equal piles (4 each).
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '8 ÷ 2 = 4'. Child eats one pile as reward.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child uses 'greater than' and 'less than' hand signs (wide for >, narrow for <).
subtasks.how_they_help: You write two numbers. Child shows sign. You check.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child shows fraction by tearing paper into 4 equal pieces.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '1/4' on each. Child points to one piece.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child builds a pattern: red, blue, red, blue with blocks. You extend.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks. Thumbs up or fixes.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a bar chart of family ages (using squares).
subtasks.how_they_help: You label ages. Child points to tallest bar.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a math game (e.g., throw ball into cup = 2 points).
subtasks.how_they_help: You play by child's rules. Child keeps score with tally marks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a bean in wet cotton. Put in cup.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws day 1. Writes date. Places on windowsill.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each morning, child draws bean growth.
subtasks.how_they_help: Measures height with string. Tapes string next to drawing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put one bean in dark cupboard, one on windowsill.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws both after 3 days. Compares with arrows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill two cups: one with soil, one with sand. Plant a seed each.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child waters equally. Draws difference after 5 days.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a celery stalk in colored water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks after 4 hours. Cuts stalk. Draws colored lines.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a leaf under a clear cup in sun. Observe water drops.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws drops. Writes 'transpiration'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Mix baking soda and vinegar in a bottle. Stretch balloon over top.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches balloon inflate. Draws before and after.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put an ice cube on a plate. Observe melting every 10 min.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws 4 stages (0,10,20,30 min). Writes time under each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Drop a raisin in soda water (or vinegar + baking soda water).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches raisin rise and fall. Draws 3 pictures.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a science poster: 'What I learned this week'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Includes bean, celery, balloon, ice, raisin. Labels each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a 5-step recipe for a sandwich.
subtasks.how_they_help: You follow exactly. Child points if step missing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 'How to tie a shoe' in 6 steps.
subtasks.how_they_help: You try. Child corrects by pointing to step.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write instructions for a simple game (hopscotch).
subtasks.how_they_help: You play. Child referees with thumbs up/down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a letter to a friend (3 sentences).
subtasks.how_they_help: You help with spelling if asked. Child draws a picture too.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write 5 safety rules for kitchen (No touching stove, etc.).
subtasks.how_they_help: Post on fridge. Child points to rule when needed.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes morning routine in order (wake, brush, dress, eat).
subtasks.how_they_help: You check. Child marks each as done.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write directions from bedroom to kitchen (left, right, straight).
subtasks.how_they_help: You follow. If lost, child points to paper.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a thank-you note to a family member.
subtasks.how_they_help: You deliver. Family member writes back. Child reads.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write a 3-question interview for a family member (favorite food, color, game).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child gives paper. Family member writes answers. Child reads.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new board game and writes rules (3 steps).
subtasks.how_they_help: You play. Child judges if rules clear.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts out 'I woke up late for school' (30 seconds).
subtasks.how_they_help: You write what you think happened. Child nods or re-acts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use 5 hand puppets (paper bags) to tell a story.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child moves puppets. You narrate silently (write key words).

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 6-panel story without words.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write 1 sentence per panel. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Play 'Emotion freeze dance': Music stops, child shows emotion.
subtasks.how_they_help: You guess. Child nods. Then child leads.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child re-enacts a family memory (birthday, picnic) silently.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family guesses. Clap when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child uses only body movements to say 'I am tired', 'I am hungry', 'I am happy'.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write each. Child confirms with thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a silent commercial for a favorite snack (30 sec).
subtasks.how_they_help: You rate 1-5 with fingers. Child tries to improve.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts a short joke (slips on banana, looks around, shrugs).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family laughs. Child bows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child directs family in a silent movie (cowboy, alien, robot).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to each person. You follow.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates a silent 'weather report' (sunny, rainy, windy actions).
subtasks.how_they_help: You guess weather. Child gives thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a 3x3 grid with 8 numbers (missing one). Child fills.
subtasks.how_they_help: You check. Nod or point to wrong cell.

subtasks.what_to_do: Create a pattern: ▲ ■ ▲ ■ ___. Child fills.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws next two. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child arranges 5 sticks from shortest to longest.
subtasks.how_they_help: You check. Child reorders if wrong.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a clock with missing numbers. Child fills.
subtasks.how_they_help: You set a time (point to hour). Child points to matching on clock.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child sorts mixed buttons by color, then by size.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write 'color' and 'size'. Child points to which was faster.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a half-completed symmetrical shape. Child completes.
subtasks.how_they_help: Use grid paper. Child checks with mirror.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates a code where shape = number (▲=1, ■=2, ●=3). Writes 4-digit code.
subtasks.how_they_help: You decode. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a maze on paper. Child solves with finger.
subtasks.how_they_help: You time with stopwatch. Child repeats to beat time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child matches 5 uppercase to 5 lowercase letters (A-a, B-b).
subtasks.how_they_help: You draw lines. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new puzzle for you (e.g., find the odd one out).
subtasks.how_they_help: You solve. Child gives thumbs up or down.

subtasks.what_to_do: Build a 10-card tower with a sibling or friend. No talking.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points where to place. Sibling follows.

subtasks.what_to_do: Blindfolded partner draws what child describes using hand gestures (big circle, small square).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child gestures. Partner draws. Compare.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child and partner pass a ball without dropping (use eye contact only).
subtasks.how_they_help: Count successful passes. Try to beat record.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child arranges 5 objects. Partner must copy arrangement exactly.
subtasks.how_they_help: Partner looks for 10 seconds, then copies. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child and partner stand back to back. One builds a shape with blocks. Other copies without seeing.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child gives hand signals (tap = add block). Compare at end.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a simple path on paper. Partner walks it blindfolded with child tapping left/right shoulder for direction.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child guides. Partner tries to reach end.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child and partner sort a mixed pile of 20 beans into 4 cups by color. No talking.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to cup. Partner puts bean. Switch roles.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts out a profession (doctor, teacher, farmer). Partner guesses and writes.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child nods. Then swap.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child and partner create a handshake with 5 moves. Teach another family member.
subtasks.how_they_help: Demonstrate silently. Other copies. Child corrects by showing again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a silent team game (e.g., copy my clap pattern).
subtasks.how_they_help: Family plays. Child judges winner.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw or cut 6 pictures: wake, eat, study, play, clean, sleep.
subtasks.how_they_help: Give paper and old magazines. Child arranges in order.

subtasks.what_to_do: Write time (or draw clock) next to each activity.
subtasks.how_they_help: Show watch. Child copies numbers. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hang schedule on wall at child's eye level.
subtasks.how_they_help: Each morning child points to first task. Completes it. Then points to next.

subtasks.what_to_do: Add a 'done' box next to each task. Child puts a stone or mark when done.
subtasks.how_they_help: At end of day, count how many done. Child claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: One day, swap two pictures (play before study). Child must fix.
subtasks.how_they_help: Point to wrong order. Child rearranges. Nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Add a new task (water plants) to schedule.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws new card. Adds to wall. Does task daily.

subtasks.what_to_do: Create a 'special day' card (birthday, holiday). Replace regular task.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child tapes over regular task. Removes next day.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches schedule to sibling using only pointing.
subtasks.how_they_help: Sibling follows. Child gives thumbs up or points to correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Make a weekly schedule (Monday to Sunday) with different colors for each day.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child colors each day. Hangs below daily schedule.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child reviews week: points to each completed task. Counts total.
subtasks.how_they_help: Write total number on calendar. Child claps.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use 10 stones. Child makes 2 piles of 5 stones each.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '5 + 5 = 10'. Child points to piles.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child splits 6 buttons into 2 equal piles.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '6 ÷ 2 = 3'. Child counts each pile.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a number line 0-10 on ground with chalk. Child jumps from 2 to 6.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '2 + 4 = 6'. Child jumps again.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child arranges sticks from shortest to longest (5 sticks).
subtasks.how_they_help: You check. Child reorders if wrong.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use clay to make a circle. Cut into 4 equal pieces.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child labels each '1/4'. Points to one piece.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates pattern: red bean, white bean, red bean, white bean (10 total).
subtasks.how_they_help: You extend pattern. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child measures table using hand spans. Writes number.
subtasks.how_they_help: Then measures using pencil. Compares numbers.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child shows 'greater than' by holding two piles of stones (5 vs 2).
subtasks.how_they_help: You write '5 > 2'. Child nods.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a bar graph of family shoe sizes (using stickers or marks).
subtasks.how_they_help: You label. Child points to tallest bar.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a math game using stones and cup (e.g., throw stone in cup = 2 points).
subtasks.how_they_help: You play. Child keeps score with tally marks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a bean in wet cotton. Put in clear cup.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws day 1. Writes date. Places on windowsill.

subtasks.what_to_do: Each morning, child draws bean growth and measures height with string.
subtasks.how_they_help: Tape string next to drawing. Compare daily.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put one bean in dark cupboard, one on windowsill.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws both after 5 days. Uses arrows to show difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill two cups: soil vs sand. Plant a seed each.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child waters equally. Draws difference after 7 days.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put a celery stalk in colored water.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks after 6 hours. Cuts stalk. Draws colored lines.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place a leaf under clear cup in sun. Observe water drops.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws drops. You write 'transpiration'. Child copies.

subtasks.what_to_do: Mix baking soda and vinegar in bottle. Stretch balloon over top.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches balloon inflate. Draws before and after.

subtasks.what_to_do: Put ice cube on plate. Observe every 10 min for 30 min.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws 4 stages. Writes time under each.

subtasks.what_to_do: Drop raisin in soda water (or vinegar + baking soda water).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches raisin rise and fall. Draws 3 pictures.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 'Science Week' poster with 4 experiments.
subtasks.how_they_help: Labels bean, celery, balloon, ice. Displays on wall.

subtasks.what_to_do: Create 10 picture cards (water, food, help, hurt, yes, no, play, sleep, want, toilet).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child shows card. You respond. Child thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 4-step 'How to wash hands' instruction.
subtasks.how_they_help: You follow. Child points if step missing.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child uses 'yes' and 'no' cards to answer 5 questions.
subtasks.how_they_help: You ask. Child holds up card. You nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes a simple note: 'I am hungry. Want rice.'
subtasks.how_they_help: You read. Prepare food. Child writes 'thank you'.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents 3 hand signals (come, stop, wait).
subtasks.how_they_help: Teach you. You use them. Child corrects by repeating signal.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a map of bedroom to kitchen with symbols (→, ←, ↑, ↓).
subtasks.how_they_help: You follow. If lost, child points to map.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates a 'Feelings' board (happy, sad, angry, tired) with drawings.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child points to feeling. You respond (hug, water, rest).

subtasks.what_to_do: Child writes safety rules for crossing road (3 steps with drawings).
subtasks.how_they_help: Post on door. Child points before going out.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child teaches a friend 5 picture cards.
subtasks.how_they_help: Friend uses cards to ask for water, food. Child gives thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new communication symbol for 'I love you'.
subtasks.how_they_help: Draws on card. Uses with family. Family copies back.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw 6 pictures of a daily activity (making tea). Mix them.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child arranges in order. You check. Nod.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a 4-panel comic 'A lost key found'.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write 1 sentence per panel. Child reads.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use emotion cards (happy, sad, angry, scared). Child acts.
subtasks.how_they_help: You guess. Child nods or re-acts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut 5 pictures from old newspaper. Arrange to tell a story.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child glues on paper. Writes 1 word per picture.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child acts a short story (3 scenes) without words.
subtasks.how_they_help: You write what happened. Child nods or re-acts.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws 'My morning routine' in 5 boxes with times.
subtasks.how_they_help: Display in bathroom. Child points to each as done.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child tells story using 5 objects (cup, key, shoe, spoon, book).
subtasks.how_they_help: Moves objects. You guess story.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child re-enacts a family memory (birthday) silently.
subtasks.how_they_help: Family guesses. Clap when correct.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a new ending to a known story (draw 3 panels).
subtasks.how_they_help: Display with original. Family points to favorite.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates a silent 'weather report' (sun, rain, wind actions).
subtasks.how_they_help: You guess. Child gives thumbs up.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper in half. Paint on one side. Press and open.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child observes mirror image. Draws line of symmetry.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw half a butterfly. Child draws other half.
subtasks.how_they_help: Use grid paper if available. Compare halves.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use a mirror (or still water). Child writes name backwards so mirror shows correct.
subtasks.how_they_help: Practice 3 times. Write final on paper.

subtasks.what_to_do: Cut a circle from paper. Fold into 2, 4, 8 parts.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child labels fractions (1/2, 1/4, 1/8).

subtasks.what_to_do: Build symmetric tower with blocks (left mirrors right).
subtasks.how_they_help: You build left half. Child mirrors right. Check with mirror.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw vertical line. Child draws shapes on left. You mirror right.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child checks. Thumbs up or corrects.

subtasks.what_to_do: Find 5 symmetric objects in house (plate, book, spoon, cup, window).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws each. Draws line of symmetry.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fold paper twice. Cut shapes from edges. Unfold.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child counts identical sections (4). Names symmetric.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child draws a symmetric monster. Cuts in half. Friend matches halves.
subtasks.how_they_help: Time with stopwatch. Child writes time.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child creates a symmetric pattern using colored beans on a grid.
subtasks.how_they_help: You copy on other half. Child checks.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stretch balloon over bowl. Place rice on top.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child taps bowl from below. Sees rice jump. Draws.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hum while holding balloon to cheek (child cannot hear but feels).
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels vibration. Then hums louder. Notes difference.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill 4 glasses with different water levels. Tap with spoon.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child observes water movement. Ranks from most to least ripple.

subtasks.what_to_do: Stretch rubber band over box. Pluck hard, then soft.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches vibration. Draws big vs small waves.

subtasks.what_to_do: Place hand on table. Someone taps far end.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels vibration. Moves hand closer. Notes stronger feel.

subtasks.what_to_do: Use metal spoon and plastic spoon. Tap both on table.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child feels which vibrates longer. Writes result.

subtasks.what_to_do: Fill bowl with water. Tap edge with spoon.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child watches ripples. Drops a leaf. Sees leaf move.

subtasks.what_to_do: Hold ruler half off table. Pluck end.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child sees vibration. Moves ruler shorter. Notes faster vibration.

subtasks.what_to_do: Child invents a 'vibration dance' (move body to strong taps).
subtasks.how_they_help: You tap table in rhythm. Child dances. You copy child's move.

subtasks.what_to_do: Draw a poster 'What makes vibration?' with 5 examples.
subtasks.how_they_help: Child draws rubber band, drum, glass, balloon, ruler. Display.
